CE1.justification: Agent acted directly using the runbook and user-provided inputs without asking clarifying questions or requiring the user to load anything.

CE2.justification: Response is mostly dense and informative but has one stretch of softening prose at the end ("None of these are heavy lifts... isn't a defensible call") that goes slightly beyond the terse decision.

CE3.justification: Said where the output went (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md) and why (followed runbook path convention over user's offhand path) in-line in the response and notes.

CE4.justification: Each artifact (checklist, daybook) was committed as a complete file with the Go/No-go decision written in, leaving no orphaned in-progress state.
